extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I counted only the Against Company, Against Directors, Against Promoters and Against Subsidiaries rows, excluding all By rows. Criminal proceedings against were 1 company + 0 directors + 1 promoter + 0 subsidiaries = 2; statutory/regulatory proceedings against were 1 company + 0 subsidiaries = 1; tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries were 2 + 4 = 6, excluding promoter/director tax matters because none are shown. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries was not stated as a group total, so I summed ₹55.76 million against the Company and ₹120.65 million against Subsidiaries = ₹176.41 million, or ₹17.641 crore; promoter/director amounts and all By-row amounts were excluded. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹73.56 million as of March 31, 2024, converted to ₹7.356 crore, rather than summing line items. The disclosed concentration percentages are for the top five stores, not customers, so company-wide top-five/top-ten customer revenue percentages are not disclosed; all source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at 1 crore = ₹10 million.
